ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LNG terminal project */,
  "terminal_name" TEXT /* Name of the LNG terminal */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the terminal is located */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the terminal project */,
  "cost_usd_per_mtpa" REAL /* Estimated construction cost in USD per million tonnes per annum (Mtpa) */,
  "wiki_url" TEXT /* URL to the Wikipedia page for additional project information */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the terminal location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the terminal location */,
  "capacity_mtpa" REAL /* Capacity of the terminal in million tonnes per annum (Mtpa) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the project */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LNG terminal project the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the terminal project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the terminal project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during access (e.g., view, insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal project being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status change, cost update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal project the report belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., project status, cost analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)
